summary: Completed comprehensive testing of French Data Science Portfolio v3 with dark blue theme. Application works perfectly on localhost with all 8 projects, modal functionality, and filtering. External URL has routing issues but core functionality is excellent.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal does not close easily when clicking outside or pressing Escape key
ui_bugs.details: Modal backdrop click and Escape key events not properly handled

passed_tests: Dark blue theme (#0a1628) verified across all sections
All 8 projects displayed with correct data
Project filtering works for 6 categories (Machine Learning, Data Engineering, etc.)
Project modal opens with complete information (title, description, technologies, features, code snippet, GitHub link)
Thematic images load correctly for all projects (energy, banking, real estate, football, music, etc.)
CTA buttons ('Voir mes projets', 'Me contacter') present
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix external URL routing (404 error on https://endayeaime-portfolio-ea-2ql1.preview.emergentagent.com) and improve modal close functionality for better UX
